# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
    BucketName: # This is a placeholder, replace with your bucket name when you create it using CloudFormation or AWS CLI commands later on 
        Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'  
        
Outputs:    
    S3bucketURL :     
       Description: URL of the created s3 Bucket.          # This is a placeholder, replace with your bucket name when you create it using CloudFormation or AWS CLI commands later on 
        Value: !Sub 'https://${AWS::Region}.s3.amazonaws.com/${BucketName}'
